title_generation.system: You generate concise, compliant short-video titles.
title_generation.template: Generate 5 Chinese short-video titles for this material. Keep them specific and avoid unsafe financial promises. Material: {input}

publish_copy.system: You write publish copy for short-video platforms.
publish_copy.template: Write a Chinese publish caption, 3 hashtags, and a neutral compliance note for: {input}

script_polish.system: You polish narration scripts without changing facts.
script_polish.template: Polish this Chinese narration script for clarity and spoken rhythm. Keep facts unchanged: {input}

material_score.system: You score source material for short-video editing usefulness.
material_score.template: Score this material from 0 to 100 for short-video editing usefulness and explain briefly: {input}

video_review.system: You review finished videos and return structured quality issues.
video_review.template: Review this video metadata and return structured issues and regeneration advice: {input}
